ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the election took place */,
  "election_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "is_special_election" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the election is a special election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who cast votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each candidate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the candidate */,
  "political_experience" INTEGER /* Years of political experience */,
  "campaign_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's campaign website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each county */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "zip_codes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of zip codes in the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_data" (
  "voting_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting data entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election this data belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county this data belongs to */,
  "precinct" INTEGER /* Precinct number */,
  "obama_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for Barack Obama */,
  "romney_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for Mitt Romney */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method used */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of voters who cast votes in the precinct */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who cast votes in the precinct */,
  "voter_age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of voters in the precinct */,
  "voter_income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution of voters in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_voting_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("voting_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method (e.g., in-person, absentee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  "early_voting" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if early voting is available */,
  "mail_voting" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if mail voting is available */,
  "voting_period" TEXT /* Period during which voting is allowed */,
  "voting_location" TEXT /* Typical location for in-person voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county this demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the county population */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution of the county population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Race distribution of the county population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of the county population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the county population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county population */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Education level distribution of the county population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "election_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election this result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate this result belongs to */,
  "votes_received" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  "electoral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of electoral votes received by the candidate (if applicable) */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_voting_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election this data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election this prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_winner" TEXT /* Predicted winner of the election */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
